name: Taiyen Biotech Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiyen Biotech Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of salt products under the TAIYEN brand in Taiwan and internationally. The company's products include skincare, healthcare, cleaning, aqua, medical supplies, and snack food products. It also operates stores; and engages in the foundry business. The company was founded in 1952 and is based in Tainan, Taiwan.
